params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Service version number. The current value is 2.

params.name: ext
params.description: Expected response format.

params.name: geometries
params.description: Comma separated list of geometry UUIDs, previously retrieved from an Search API request.

params.name: geometriesZoom
params.description: Defines the precision of the geometries.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Service version number. The current value is 2.

params.name: category
params.description: Query string. Must be properly URL encoded.

params.name: ext
params.description: Expected response format.

params.name: typeahead
params.description: If the "typeahead" flag is set, the query will be interpreted as a partial input and the search will enter predictive mode.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of search results that will be returned.

params.name: ofs
params.description: Starting offset of the returned results within the full result set.

params.name: countrySet
params.description: Comma separated string of country codes. This will limit the search to the specified countries.

params.name: lat
params.description:
Latitude where results should be biased.  
NOTE: supplying a lat/lon without a radius will return search results biased to that point.

params.name: lon
params.description:
Longitude where results should be biased
NOTE: supplying a lat/lon without a radius will return search results biased to that point.

params.name: radius
params.description: If radius and position are set, the results will be constrained to the defined area. The radius parameter is specified in meters.

params.name: topLeft
params.description: Top left position of the bounding box. This is specified as a comma separated string composed of lat., lon.

params.name: btmRight
params.description: Bottom right position of the bounding box. This is specified as a comma separated string composed of lat., lon.

params.name: language
params.description: Language in which search results should be returned. Should be one of supported IETF language tags, case insensitive.

params.name: idxSet
params.description: A comma separated list of indexes which should be utilized for the search. Item order does not matter. Available indexes are: - Addr = Address range interpolation (when there is no PAD) - Geo = Geographies - PAD = Point Addresses - POI = Points of interest - Str = Streets - Xstr = Cross Streets (intersections)

params.name: multiplier
params.description: Multiplies the limit by N to gather more candidate POIs, which will then be sorted by drive distance, returning only the top candidates according to the limit.

params.name: routingTimeout
params.description: Only return results that arrive from routing engine within this time limit.

params.description: 2 or 3 letter country code (e.g.: FR, ES).

params.description: Maximum number of search results that will be returned.

params.name: ofs
params.description: Starting offset of the returned results within the full result set.

params.name: streetNumber
params.description: The street number for the structured address.

params.name: streetName
params.description: The street name for the structured address.

params.name: crossStreet
params.description: The cross street name for the structured address.

params.name: municipality
params.description: The municipality (city/town) for the structured address.

params.name: municipalitySubdivision
params.description: The municipality subdivision (sub/super city) for the structured address.

params.name: countryTertiarySubdivision
params.description: The named area for the structured address.

params.name: countrySecondarySubdivision
params.description: The county for the structured address.

params.name: countrySubdivision
params.description: The state or province for the structured address.

params.name: postalCode
params.description: The zip code or postal code for the structured address.

params.name: language
params.description: Language in which search results should be returned. Should be one of supported IETF language tags, case insensitive.

params.name: extendedPostalCodesFor
params.description: Indexes for which extended postal codes should be included in the results. Available indexes are: - Addr = Address ranges - Geo = Geographies - PAD = Point Addresses - POI = Points of Interest - Str = Streets - XStr = Cross Streets (intersections)

params.name: spatialKeys
params.description: If the "spatialKeys" flag is set, the response will also contain a proprietary geospatial keys for a specified location.

params.name: heading
params.description: The directional heading in degrees, usually similar to the course along a road segment. Entered in degrees, measured clockwise from north (so north is 0, east is 90, etc.)

params.name: radius
params.description: The maximum distance in meters from the specified position for the reverse geocoder to consider.

params.name: language
params.description: Language in which search results should be returned. Should be one of supported IETF language tags, case insensitive.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Service version number. The current value is 2.

params.name: position
params.description: This is specified as a comma separated string composed of lat., lon.

params.name: ext
params.description: Expected response format.

params.name: spatialKeys
params.description: If the "spatialKeys" flag is set, the response will also contain a proprietary geospatial keys for a specified location.

params.name: returnSpeedLimit
params.description: To enable return of the posted speed limit (where available).

params.name: heading
params.description: The directional heading in degrees, usually similar to the course along a road segment. Entered in degrees, measured clockwise from north (so north is 0, east is 90, etc.)

params.name: radius
params.description: The maximum distance in meters from the specified position for the reverse geocoder to consider.

params.name: number
params.description: If a number is sent in along with the request, the response may include the side of the street (Left/Right) and an offset position for that number.

params.name: returnRoadUse
params.description: Enables return of the road use array for reverse geocodes at street level.

params.name: roadUse
params.description: Restricts reverse geocodes to a certain type of road use. The road use array for reverse geocodes can be one or more of: ["LimitedAccess", "Arterial", "Terminal", "Ramp", "Rotary", "LocalStreet"].

params.name: callback
params.description: Specifies the jsonp callback method.
